# Codexo - Local Blog

> Codexo is a AI Software Services serving Atlanta, GA. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO, and AEO content to help residents find trusted local services.

## About

- **Business:** Codexo
- **Industry:** AI Software Services
- **Location:** Atlanta, GA
- **Website:** https://codexotech.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.codexotech.com/blog/

## Topics Covered

This blog covers local service topics including: ai software services acworth ga reviews, ai software services acworth ga jobs, rolm ai, logical technology phone call, who are the big 3 ai companies, who are the 7 ai companies, what are the top 10 ai companies right now, what is the ai strategy in georgia

## Content Schedule

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search keywords
- Wednesday: Local authority content (best-of lists, how-to guides, cost guides)
- Thursday: GEO and AEO content optimized for AI search engines
